title: Sable Encounters
description: way of making sable sublevels spawn with entities/structures
body:
it currently adds 10 entities that upon spawning instantly spawn a set sable schematic also adds a block that replaces nearby creative motors with survival motors, an only sometimes working block thats supposed to turn into a chest with random loot from a loot table (currently trying to fix that) and a super cool system for stuff to despawn so it doesnt pile up 

can be used to make sable subgrids spawn with datapack or mod (im close to making it not need one)

the newer versions have another file attached with some preset encounters that you can put in your mods folder and then when you start your game for the first time it will say that its not a mod file where you have to click proceed to world screen and it wont happen again

it also adds some sublevels spawning during a raid and i will add a big automated pillager airship that spawns at the end of a raid as a boss

i can see this getting used in one of these big modpacks like "Into the Betweenlands" where theres already everything configured so you can just hit create new world and have the perfect modded experience

ALSO IF YOU CRASH WITH THE ERROR MESSAGE SAYING SOMETHING ABOUT AN UNCOUGHT PARRALEL PROSSESING ERROR PLEASE CONTACT ME on discord (Bommelnator.) or in the comments on curseforge i need to look if im the only one that crashes sometimes
if you get that error just restart it only happens sometimes
